gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T.element FROM atom AS T WHERE T.molecule_id = 'TR000' ORDER BY T.element LIMIT 3
pred_sql: SELECT element FROM (SELECT element, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR000' GROUP BY element ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 3) ORDER BY element ASC;
question: Please list top three elements of the toxicology of the molecule TR000 in alphabetical order.
